# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

We are committed to fostering an open, welcoming, and inclusive environment for everyone.

All participants in this project are expected to adhere to this Code of Conduct.

---

## Expected Behavior

Participants are expected to:

- Be respectful and inclusive
- Provide constructive feedback
- Respect differing opinions
- Communicate professionally

---

## Unacceptable Behavior

The following behaviors are not tolerated:

- Harassment or discrimination
- Offensive comments
- Personal attacks
- Public or private harassment

---

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing this code of conduct.

They may remove or reject contributions that violate these rules.

---

## Reporting Issues

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, please report it to the project maintainers.

All reports will be handled confidentially.
